name: Sheppard AFB
profile: Military-friendly Sheppard AFB housing snapshot anchored to Wichita Falls / Burkburnett, built for PCSUnited base-level market overviews.

market_metrics.market_type_summary: High affordability with slow, steady appreciation

mortgage_assumptions.defaults_note: Based on March 2026 Texas VA loan rates.

notes: Property taxes and insurance materially affect true monthly ownership cost near Sheppard.
Insurance and HOA should be included in all-in housing cost comparisons.

avg_home_mortgage_monthly.notes: VA loan estimate; high property taxes typical for Texas are offset by low base prices.

crime_status.metro_shreveport_bossier: Wichita Falls is generally safe; property crime is concentrated in older central districts.

school_quality.on_base: No on-base schools; students attend Wichita Falls ISD.
school_quality.off_base: Burkburnett ISD and Iowa Park CISD are highly preferred by military families.

rental_vacancy.notes: Abundant supply of affordable rental housing near base.

rental_metrics.notes: Abundant supply of affordable rental housing near base.

military_lifestyle_fit.description: Deep historical ties to the base; community support is a top priority for the city.

financial_brief.affordability_summary: Low entry costs make this one of the most accessible markets for junior enlisted personnel.
financial_brief.buyer_opportunity: Strongest in Burkburnett and the newer developments in South Wichita Falls.

market_bluf.bluf_summary: Low cost of living and high VA loan accessibility define this market.

summary_points: Sheppard Air Force Base sits in the Wichita Falls / Burkburnett housing market with base-specific affordability, commute, and neighborhood tradeoffs.
Current market trend is approximately 1.5% year-over-year, which should shape buyer leverage and pricing discipline.
Low entry costs make this one of the most accessible markets for junior enlisted personnel.
Neighborhood quality varies across Wichita Falls, Burkburnett, Iowa Park corridor and other nearby corridors — citywide averages should not be the only filter.
Low cost of living and high VA loan accessibility define this market.
opportunities: Sheppard military demand can support durable housing relevance for disciplined buyers and landlords.
Local inventory and pricing may offer opportunity for households that stress-test taxes, insurance, and commute together.
Wichita Falls and nearby corridors may offer stronger family or value positioning depending on assignment length.
Assignment-length clarity can improve rent-versus-buy decisions near Sheppard.
risks: Neighborhood quality, schools, commute, and monthly carrying costs vary across the Wichita Falls / Burkburnett market.
Property taxes, insurance, HOA, and utilities can widen the gap between list price and true monthly payment.
Market averages can hide weak submarkets — property-level review matters.
Stretching beyond a safe housing ratio can reduce PCS flexibility.
buyer_notes: Sheppard buyers should compare all-in monthly cost, not just principal and interest.
Verify school zones, commute timing, and BAH fit by exact address before signing.
Strongest in Burkburnett and the newer developments in South Wichita Falls.
This market rewards disciplined buyers who test the commute during expected report hours.
seller_notes: Sellers should price against current inventory and days on market rather than older peak assumptions.
Move-in-ready presentation and realistic pricing matter when buyers have leverage.
Military-adjacent commute convenience can be a listing strength if framed clearly.
investor_angles: Military turnover near Sheppard can support rental demand, but vacancy and maintenance should be modeled conservatively.
Investors should underwrite taxes, insurance, HOA, and property condition — not just acquisition price.
Practical commute corridors often outperform generic metro averages for military renter demand.
buyer_guidance: Use all-in monthly payment as the primary screen.
Compare taxes, insurance, commute, school quality, and resale flexibility before locking a neighborhood.
Do not choose housing based only on distance to Sheppard.
A slightly lower purchase price can materially improve monthly PCS flexibility.
seller_guidance: Price against active inventory and days on market.
Condition and presentation matter when buyers can compare more options.
Military commute convenience can help positioning if described accurately.
landlord_notes: Military renter demand can improve occupancy durability near Sheppard.
Model vacancy, repairs, insurance, and turnover conservatively.
Stable spread matters more than headline affordability alone.

market.market_type_summary: High affordability with slow, steady appreciation

base_profile.installation_type: Technical Training / Pilot Training / Mission Support
base_profile.primary_mission_summary: Sheppard AFB is a major technical and pilot training installation in Wichita Falls with affordable training-community housing.
base_profile.pcs_personality: Deep historical ties to the base; community support is a top priority for the city.
base_profile.base_bluf: Low cost of living and high VA loan accessibility define this market.

user_positioning.military_family_bluf: Prioritize school-zone verification, BAH fit, commute testing, childcare access, and total monthly housing cost before signing near Sheppard.
user_positioning.single_airman_bluf: Prioritize commute simplicity, affordability, rental flexibility, and access to daily services around Wichita Falls.
user_positioning.realtor_bluf: Lead with BAH realism, commute risk, school-zone confidence, and all-in payment math for Sheppard clients — not generic Wichita Falls / Burkburnett stats alone.
user_positioning.investor_bluf: Rental demand near Sheppard is influenced by PCS turnover, training/permanent-party mix, and practical commute corridors.

gate_selection_logic: Start with the user's likely duty location.
Identify the most realistic primary gate.
Compare the commute during the user's actual report window.
Do not choose a neighborhood based only on mileage.
commute_intelligence.user_instruction: Before signing a lease or contract, test the commute from the exact property address to the expected gate during the same time window you would normally report to work.

bah_market_reality.bah_bluf: Sheppard housing decisions should compare BAH against rent, mortgage, utilities, debt, and commute. BAH is a decision filter, not a promise of affordability.
recommended_calculations: BAH with dependents vs estimated rent
BAH without dependents vs estimated rent
Total housing cost vs 30% income lane
Residual monthly income after expenses and housing
bah_market_reality.base_tab_message: Show BAH as a decision filter for Sheppard, not a promise of affordability. Push users into PCSUnited financial calculators when the housing gap looks tight.

family_readiness.family_bluf: Families PCSing to Sheppard should verify school zones, childcare options, medical access, commute reality, and housing availability before choosing a neighborhood.

school_guidance.school_zone_warning: Always verify school assignment by exact address before signing a lease or purchase contract.
school_guidance.nearby_school_district_note: Burkburnett ISD and Iowa Park CISD are highly preferred by military families.

childcare_guidance.cdc_note: Child Development Center availability, waitlists, and eligibility should be verified directly with official base resources.
childcare_guidance.youth_program_note: Youth programs and school-age care can materially affect family housing decisions.

medical_guidance.primary_medical_anchor: Sheppard Air Force Base medical services
medical_guidance.medical_warning: Verify clinic availability, pharmacy procedures, and emergency care options directly with official medical sources.

family_readiness.spouse_employment_note: The broader Wichita Falls / Burkburnett metro may offer spouse employment options, but commute, childcare, and credentialing should be considered together.

before_arrival: Verify official gate and Visitor Control Center hours.

Tour properties before committing when possible.
first_30_days: Finalize housing only after comparing commute, BAH fit, school zones, and total monthly cost.
Save emergency, medical, gate, and housing office contact information.
Update PCSUnited profile and financial readiness dashboard with final housing numbers.

pcs_watchouts.message: Never assume a school assignment from neighborhood name alone.

pcs_watchouts.title: BAH is not the full affordability picture

parser_notes: This Sheppard AFB file was upgraded to the Lackland-style PCSUnited schema with slug, name, state_code, profile, market_metrics, metrics, ownership_costs, costs, rental_metrics, summary_points, risks, opportunities, buyer_notes, seller_notes, investor_angles, and guidance arrays.
Wichita Falls / Burkburnett is preserved as the surrounding metro/submarket context; base-specific market data was retained.
property_tax_rate and insurance_rate are normalized to decimal form for deterministic math, with percent aliases preserved for display compatibility.

This file now includes base_profile for the PCSUnited Base tab, including gate orientation, visitor control center, major services, on-base housing, recommended nearby neighborhoods, commute intelligence, BAH market guidance, PCS watchouts, and source notes.
